name: Sales Ops Admins for Shopify Plus stores processing 10–20 commission statements/week tool
description: For Sales Ops Admins for Shopify Plus stores processing 10–20 commission statements/week, manual generation causes delays in payments. We automate the generation and emailing of statements instead of manual generation using spreadsheets.

problem_solved: Delays in generating and distributing sales commission statements
